2024October 18, 2024

🇳🇴 Stavanger, Norway

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Stavanger, Norway, October 18, 2024 -- October 25, 2024

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2024-10-stavanger-norway

21 Resolutions

1151Plenary
Revise schedule for ISO/CD 10303-238 ed4
SC 4 resolves to modify the target dates for the project as follows: * Enquiry stage (DIS): 2025-12-30 * Publication stage: 2026-12-30
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1150Plenary
Revise schedule for ISO/AWI TR 8000-320
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS and move the ISO/AWI TR 8000-320 ed.1, ISO.PID:88287 project from SDT 18 to SDT 36 with the following target dates for each stage: * Co...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1149Plenary
Launch a PWI for ISO 23726-1
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 decides to initiate a project which will develop a New Work Item Proposal (NP) by October 2025 with the following terms of reference: * Register a Preliminary Work Item ISO/PWI 2372...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1148Plenary
Launch PWI for ISO 10303-242 ed5 and nominate experts
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS and initiate the revision of ISO 10303-242 ed4 as a Preliminary Work Item with an expected submission of NP ballot on or before 2025-10...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1147Plenary
Launch NP for ISO/TS 15926-4 ed4
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS and launch edition 4 using the SDT 18 track, names Onno Paap as Project Leader, and allocates the work to WG 3 with the following terms...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1146Plenary
Establish a liaison from ISO/TC 184/SC 4 to ISO/TC 10 and IEC/TC 3
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to establish a liaison from SC4 to ISO/TC 10 and to IEC/TC 3 and appoints Christophe Mouton, Yves Keraron, Hiroshi Murayama, Arild Waaler, Hayley Thompson, and Y...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1145Plenary
Establish a liaison from ISO/TC 184/SC 4 to ISO/TC 258
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager establish a liaison from SC4 to ISO/TC 258 and appoints Lillian Hella to serve as liaison representative for a three-year term [2024 - 2027], with appreciation f...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1144Plenary
Reconfirm Deputy Convenor special responsibilities for WG 13 and WG 23
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 recognizes the role of a Deputy Convenor to support the Convenor in the completion of his/her tasks when the Convenor is temporarily unavailable to do so. Though not necessary to ha...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1143Plenary
Appoint Convenors and Deputy Convenors for SC 4

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Set 8-week ballot duration for new work item proposals

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to all the experts, delegates, and leaders for successfully executing our hybrid plenary meeting in Stavanger, Norway.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
